subject: [PATCH v5 8/9] dax/kmem: add sysfs interface for atomic whole-device hotplug

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch adds a sysfs interface to enable atomic whole-device hotplug operations for DAX kmem devices. It introduces a new 'state' attribute that allows devices to be transitioned between different states, including unplugged, online, and offline. The patch also includes changes to prevent deadlock during unbind operations and to handle legacy auto_online_blocks=offline policy. The atomic whole-device hotplug operation is implemented using the dax_kmem_do_hotremove() function, which collects all added ranges and offlines/removes them in one operation. This patch addresses a race condition that existed when trying to offline and remove an entire multi-block DAX kmem device.
